cases.prompt: 단위경제 모델링해줘. LTV CAC랑 payback 기간 봐줘. 이 가격이면 남는 장사야?

assertions.text: Produces a UNIT_ECONOMICS.md with cohort LTV, CAC, payback months, LTV:CAC.

cases.prompt: Model our unit economics — is this sustainable given our CAC and contribution margin?

assertions.text: Pressure-tests LTV against CAC with a payback period.
